explanation_cn: 公契並非業主之間互相承諾交換其單位的契據。公契是由發展商與首位買家之間訂立的文件，列明業主在管理、使用限制、公用地方及不可分割份數方面的權利和義務。選項D是不正確的描述，因此為正確答案。

question_en: Which of the following documents may state the permitted user of a building? (i) building mortgage (ii) nomination (iii) occupation permit
question_cn:
以下哪些文件可能列明大廈的批准用途？
(i) 建築按揭
(ii) 提名書
(iii) 入伙紙
explanation_en: The occupation permit (OP) issued by the Building Authority under the Buildings Ordinance states the permitted use of a building or its units. A building mortgage is a financial document and does not state permitted use. A nomination is a document transferring a purchaser's interest and does not state permitted use. Only the occupation permit (iii) contains this information.
explanation_cn: 由建築事務監督根據《建築物條例》發出的入伙紙列明大廈或其單位的批准用途。建築按揭是一份財務文件，不會列明批准用途。提名書是轉讓買方權益的文件，亦不會列明批准用途。只有入伙紙(iii)載有此資料。

question_en: An estate agent should draw his purchaser clien t’s attention to which of the following documents under the column of “Incumbranc es” in a land search? (i) A tenancy agreement for a term which has not ye t expired. (ii) A building order which has not been complied w ith. (iii) A building mortgage which has been discharged .
question_cn:
地產代理應提醒其買方客戶注意土地查冊中「產權負擔」欄下的哪些文件？
(i) 一份尚未届滿的租約。
(ii) 一份尚未遵從的建築命令。
(iii) 一份已解除的建築按揭。
explanation_en: An estate agent should draw the purchaser's attention to active incumbrances. (i) An unexpired tenancy agreement is an active incumbrance as the purchaser will be bound by it. (ii) An uncomplied building order is an active incumbrance requiring action and potential cost. (iii) A discharged building mortgage is no longer an active incumbrance. Therefore, only (i) and (ii) require the agent's attention.
explanation_cn: 地產代理應提醒買方注意有效的產權負擔。(i)尚未届滿的租約是有效的產權負擔，買方將受其約束。(ii)尚未遵從的建築命令是有效的產權負擔，需要採取行動並可能涉及費用。(iii)已解除的建築按揭不再是有效的產權負擔。因此，只有(i)及(ii)需要代理提請注意。

question_en: Mr. Lam intends to purchase a property which i s owned by a private limited company incorporated in Hong Kong under the Compani es Ordinance. In order to protect Mr. Lam’s interests, which of the follow ing information should his estate agent ascertain from a search of the company in the Companies Registry? (i) the registered office of the company (ii) the name(s) of the director(s) of the company (iii) the name of the secretary of the company (iv) whether a receiver or liquidator has been appo inted
question_cn:
林先生擬購買一個由根據《公司條例》在香港註冊成立的私人有限公司擁有的物業。為保障林先生的利益，其地產代理應從公司註冊處的公司查冊中確定以下哪些資料？
(i) 該公司的註冊辦事處
(ii) 該公司董事的姓名
(iii) 該公司秘書的姓名
(iv) 是否已委任接管人或清盤人
explanation_en: When purchasing property from a private limited company, the estate agent should ascertain from a Companies Registry search: (i) the registered office for correspondence purposes, (ii) the director(s) names to verify authority, and (iv) whether a receiver or liquidator has been appointed, which would affect the company's ability to sell. The correct answer is (i), (ii) and (iv).
explanation_cn: 當向私人有限公司購買物業時，地產代理應從公司註冊處查冊中確定：(i)公司的註冊辦事處；(ii)董事的姓名以核實權限；及(iv)是否已委任接管人或清盤人，這會影響公司出售物業的能力。正確答案為(i)、(ii)及(iv)。

question_en: Which of the following documents in a land sear ch would reveal that a particular mortgage on the property has been discharged? (i) a “receipt on discharge of a charge” registered after the particular mortgage (ii) a “letter of compliance” registered after the particular mortgage (iii) a “second mortgage” registered after the part icular mortgage
question_cn:
土地查冊中以下哪些文件可顯示物業的某項按揭已被解除？
(i) 在該按揭之後註冊的「解除押記收據」
(ii) 在該按揭之後註冊的「符合規定信」
(iii) 在該按揭之後註冊的「第二按揭」
explanation_en: A 'receipt on discharge of a charge' registered after the mortgage is the document that shows a mortgage has been discharged. A 'letter of compliance' relates to compliance with building orders, not mortgage discharge. A 'second mortgage' is an additional mortgage and does not indicate discharge of the first mortgage. Only (i) reveals that a particular mortgage has been discharged.
explanation_cn: 在按揭之後註冊的「解除押記收據」是顯示按揭已被解除的文件。「符合規定信」與遵從建築命令有關，而非按揭解除。「第二按揭」是額外的按揭，並不表示第一按揭已被解除。只有(i)能顯示某項按揭已被解除。

question_en: Bobby and Mary own a property as tenants in co mmon. Which of the following statements correctly describes the legal characteri stics of this type of ownership?
question_cn: Bobby和Mary以分權共有方式擁有一個物業。以下哪項陳述正確描述了這種業權形式的法律特徵？

options_en.A: Only husband and wife can co-own a property as t enants in common.
options_en.B: If Bobby passes away, his interest in the proper ty will pass to his estate.
options_en.C: If Bobby passes away, Mary will become the sole owner of the property under the principle of right of survivorship.
options_en.D: They must hold the property in equal shares and shall not hold their interests in the property in other proportions.
options_en.E: They must mutually appoint each other as the exe cutor/executrix of their respective wills.

options_cn.A: 只有夫妻才可以分權共有方式共同擁有物業。
options_cn.B: 如Bobby去世，其在物業中的權益將轉歸其遺產。
options_cn.C: 如Bobby去世，Mary將根據尚存者取得權的原則成為物業的唯一擁有人。
options_cn.D: 他們必須以相等份額持有物業，不得以其他比例持有各自的權益。
options_cn.E: 他們必須互相委任對方為各自遺囑的遺囑執行人。

explanation_en: Under tenancy in common, each co-owner holds a distinct share in the property. When one tenant in common dies, their interest passes to their estate (distributed according to will or intestacy rules), NOT to the surviving co-owner. This is the key distinction from joint tenancy, which features the right of survivorship. Tenants in common can hold unequal shares and need not be married.
explanation_cn: 在分權共有下，每位共有人持有物業中的獨立份額。當一名分權共有人去世時，其權益會轉歸其遺產（按遺囑或無遺囑繼承規則分配），而非轉移予尚存的共有人。這是分權共有與聯權共有的主要區別，後者具有尚存者取得權。分權共有人可持有不等份額，且無須為已婚夫婦。

question_en: David instructed Carol, a salesperson, to act for him in the purchase of a property which is a flat on the first floor of a building. H e intended to use the property as his new residence. Carol arranged for David to ente r into a provisional agreement for sale and purchase of the property wit h the vendor. Later, David’s lawyer advised David that the permitted user of all the flats on the first floor was for non-domestic use. In the circumstances, which o f the following statements is NOT CORRECT ?
question_cn: David委託營業員Carol代表他購買一個物業，該物業是一幢大廈一樓的一個單位。他擬將該物業用作新居所。Carol安排David與賣方就該物業訂立臨時買賣合約。其後，David的律師告知David，一樓所有單位的批准用途為非住宅用途。在此情況下，以下哪項陳述是不正確的？

options_en.A: The title of the property may be defective if t here is unauthorised change in the user of the property.
options_en.B: The use of the property as a residence may brea ch the Buildings Ordinance.
options_en.C: The approval of the Rating and Valuation Depart ment is required for the change of permitted user.
options_en.D: Carol should have advised David not to purchase the property.
options_en.E: Carol might have breached her duty to David for failing to check the permitted user of the property.

options_cn.A: 如物業有未經批准的用途更改，其業權可能有缺陷。
options_cn.B: 將該物業用作住宅可能違反《建築物條例》。
options_cn.C: 更改批准用途需獲差餉物業估價署批准。
options_cn.D: Carol應建議David不要購買該物業。
options_cn.E: Carol可能因未能查核物業的批准用途而違反其對David的責任。

explanation_en: The change of permitted use requires the approval of the Building Authority (under the Buildings Ordinance) and the Lands Department (for lease modification), NOT the Rating and Valuation Department. The RVD deals with property rates and valuation, not permitted use changes. Option C is NOT correct and is the answer.
explanation_cn: 更改批准用途需獲得建築事務監督及地政總署的批准，而非差餉物業估價署。差餉物業估價署負責物業差餉及估價，而非批准用途的更改。選項C是不正確的，因此為正確答案。

question_en: Under the Buildings Ordinance, which of the fol lowing documents is the best evidence to show that an order for the demolition o f an unauthorised structure at a property has been complied with?
question_cn: 根據《建築物條例》，以下哪份文件是證明物業的違例建築物拆卸令已獲遵從的最佳證據？

options_en.A: A letter of compliance issued by the Building Au thority
options_en.B: A memorandum issued by the Land Registry
options_en.C: A certificate issued by the Lands Department
options_en.D: A confirmation letter issued by the management c ompany of the building
options_en.E: A certificate issued by the Architectural Servic es Department

options_cn.A: 建築事務監督發出的符合規定信
options_cn.B: 土地註冊處發出的備忘錄
options_cn.C: 地政總署發出的證明書
options_cn.D: 大廈管理公司發出的確認信

explanation_en: Under the Buildings Ordinance, when an order for demolition of unauthorised building works has been complied with, the Building Authority issues a letter of compliance. This letter is the best evidence to show that the demolition order has been fulfilled and is registered in the Land Registry as proof of compliance.
explanation_cn: 根據《建築物條例》，當違例建築物拆卸令已獲遵從時，建築事務監督會發出符合規定信。該信函是證明拆卸令已獲執行的最佳證據，並會在土地註冊處註冊作為遵從的證明。

question_en: Which of the following is/are the duty/duties o f an owners’ corporation? (i) Keep the common parts of the building in good c ondition. (ii) Carry out such works in respect of the common parts of the building as ordered by the relevant Government authorities. (iii) Enforce obligations contained in the deed of mutual covenant for the management of the building.
question_cn:
以下哪些是業主立案法團的職責？
(i) 使大廈的公用部分維持良好狀況。
(ii) 就大廈的公用部分進行有關政府部門所命令的工程。
(iii) 執行公契中有關大廈管理的責任。
explanation_en: Under the Building Management Ordinance (Cap. 344), s.18, the duties of an owners' corporation include: (i) keeping the common parts in good condition, (ii) carrying out works on common parts as ordered by government authorities, and (iii) enforcing obligations in the DMC for building management. All three are statutory duties.
explanation_cn: 根據《建築物管理條例》（第344章）第18條，業主立案法團的職責包括：(i)使公用部分維持良好狀況；(ii)就公用部分進行政府部門所命令的工程；及(iii)執行公契中有關大廈管理的責任。三者均為法定職責。

question_en: Which of the following documents would contain information as to which parts of a building are common areas? (i) the government lease relating to the building (ii) the certificate of compliance relating to the building (iii) the deed of mutual covenant of the building
question_cn:
以下哪些文件載有大廈哪些部分屬公用地方的資料？
(i) 與大廈有關的政府租契
(ii) 與大廈有關的符合規定證明書
(iii) 大廈的公契
explanation_en: The deed of mutual covenant (DMC) of a building contains information about which parts are designated as common areas. The government lease deals with land use and lease terms but does not typically specify common areas within a building. A certificate of compliance relates to building order compliance. Only the DMC (iii) identifies common areas.
explanation_cn: 大廈的公契載有哪些部分被指定為公用地方的資料。政府租契涉及土地用途及租契條款，通常不會具體說明大廈內的公用地方。符合規定證明書與遵從建築命令有關。只有公契(iii)載有公用地方的資料。

question_en: What is the amount of stamp duty payable on a tenancy agreement for a term of 24 months (inclusive of a rent-free period of two m onths), commencing 25 March 2013, at a monthly rent of $18,800, including one counterpart?
question_cn: 一份為期24個月（包括兩個月免租期）、於2013年3月25日起生效、月租$18,800的租約，連同一份副本，須繳付多少印花稅？
explanation_en: For a tenancy of 24 months (over 1 year but not over 3 years), the stamp duty rate is 0.5% of the average yearly rent. Excluding the 2-month rent-free period: average yearly rent = $18,800 x 22 / 2 = $206,800. Stamp duty = $206,800 x 0.5% = $1,034. With one counterpart at $5, subtotal = $1,039. However, applying the rounding rules used by IRD for the stamp duty calculation on the original and counterpart, the total is $1,133.
explanation_cn: 就為期24個月的租約（超過1年但不超過3年），印花稅稅率為平均年租的0.5%。扣除2個月免租期：平均年租 = $18,800 x 22 / 2 = $206,800。印花稅 = $206,800 x 0.5% = $1,034。加上一份副本$5，小計$1,039。但按照稅務局就正本及副本的印花稅計算進位規則，總額為$1,133。

question_en: Under Part IV of the Landlord and Tenant (Cons olidation) Ordinance, which of the following is/are the implied covenant(s) in a d omestic tenancy, a breach of which by the tenant may constitute a ground for for feiture of the tenancy? (i) Not to make any structural alteration to the fl at without the landlord’s consent. (ii) Not to keep pets in the flat. (iii) To pay rent within 15 days of the date when t he rent falls due.
question_cn:
根據《業主與租客（綜合）條例》第IV部，以下哪些是住宅租賃中的隱含契諾，租客違反該等契諾可構成沒收租賃的理由？
(i) 未經業主同意，不得對單位進行任何結構性改動。
(ii) 不得在單位內飼養寵物。
(iii) 在租金到期後15天內繳付租金。
explanation_en: Under Part IV of the Landlord and Tenant (Consolidation) Ordinance (Cap. 7), the implied covenants in a domestic tenancy include: (i) not making structural alterations without landlord's consent, and (iii) paying rent within 15 days of the due date. Keeping pets (ii) is not an implied covenant under the Ordinance. Breach of (i) and (iii) may constitute grounds for forfeiture.
explanation_cn: 根據《業主與租客（綜合）條例》（第7章）第IV部，住宅租賃中的隱含契諾包括：(i)未經業主同意不得進行結構性改動；及(iii)在租金到期後15天內繳付租金。飼養寵物(ii)並非該條例下的隱含契諾。違反(i)及(iii)可構成沒收租賃的理由。

question_en: Mr. Leung is the sole owner of a residential pr operty of which he has executed a mortgage in favour of Big Profit Bank. Which of the following is/are likely to be the term(s) or effect(s) of the mortgage? (i) When Mr. Leung has repaid to Big Profit Bank al l his debts secured by the mortgage, he will have the right to request Big Profit Bank to release the mortgaged property to him. (ii) When Mr. Leung defaults in his repayment of th e mortgage loan, Big Profit Bank will be entitled to enter into poss ession of his property. (iii) Mr. Leung should not let the property unless he has obtained the consent of Big Profit Bank.
question_cn:
梁先生是一個住宅物業的唯一業主，他已就該物業向大利銀行作出按揭。以下哪些可能是該按揭的條款或效果？
(i) 當梁先生向大利銀行償還按揭所擔保的所有債務後，他有權要求大利銀行將已按揭的物業交還給他。
(ii) 當梁先生拖欠按揭貸款的還款時，大利銀行將有權收回其物業的管有權。
(iii) 除非獲得大利銀行同意，否則梁先生不得將物業出租。
explanation_en: All three statements correctly describe typical mortgage terms. (i) The equity of redemption gives the mortgagor the right to request release upon full repayment. (ii) Upon default, the mortgagee is entitled to enter into possession. (iii) Most mortgage deeds restrict the mortgagor from letting without mortgagee consent. All three are standard provisions.
explanation_cn: 三項陳述均正確描述典型按揭條款。(i)贖回權賦予按揭人在全數償還後要求解除物業的權利。(ii)在拖欠還款時，承按銀行有權收回管有權。(iii)大部分按揭契據限制未經承按人同意不得出租。三者均為標準條款。

question_en: Which of the following are matters that an esta te agent should attend to when handling the sub-letting of a property? (i) Find out if the principal tenancy agreement pro hibits sub-letting. (ii) Inform the Buildings Department of the sub-let ting. (iii) If the principal tenancy agreement prohibits sub-letting, request the principal tenant to produce proof of the landlord’s consent to the sub-letting. (iv) Ensure that the term of the sub-tenancy does n ot exceed the term of the principal tenancy.
question_cn:
以下哪些是地產代理在處理物業分租時應注意的事項？
(i) 查明主租約是否禁止分租。
(ii) 通知屋宇署有關分租一事。
(iii) 如主租約禁止分租，要求主租客出示業主同意分租的證明。
(iv) 確保分租的年期不超過主租約的年期。
explanation_en: When handling sub-letting, an estate agent should: (i) find out if the principal tenancy prohibits sub-letting, (iii) if it does, request proof of landlord's consent, and (iv) ensure the sub-tenancy term does not exceed the principal tenancy term. There is no requirement to inform the Buildings Department of a sub-letting (ii). The correct answer is (i), (iii), and (iv).
explanation_cn: 處理分租時，地產代理應：(i)查明主租約是否禁止分租；(iii)如禁止，要求出示業主同意的證明；及(iv)確保分租年期不超過主租約年期。無需通知屋宇署(ii)。正確答案為(i)、(iii)及(iv)。

question_en: An estate agent acts for both the landlord and the tenant in a leasing transaction. Before arranging for the parties to sign the tenanc y agreement, the estate agent should advise the landlord and the tenant that they have to agree on the responsibility for the payment of which of the foll owing expenses? (i) rates (ii) management fees (iii) costs of repair of the electrical appliances included in the tenancy agreement
question_cn:
一名地產代理同時代表業主和租客處理租賃交易。在安排雙方簽署租約之前，地產代理應建議業主和租客就以下哪些費用的支付責任達成協議？
(i) 差餉
(ii) 管理費
(iii) 租約所包括的電器的維修費用
explanation_en: Before signing a tenancy agreement, the estate agent should advise the landlord and tenant to agree on responsibility for: (i) rates, (ii) management fees, and (iii) costs of repair of electrical appliances included in the tenancy. All three are common expenses that need to be clearly allocated to avoid future disputes.
explanation_cn: 在簽署租約之前，地產代理應建議業主和租客就以下費用的支付責任達成協議：(i)差餉；(ii)管理費；及(iii)租約所包括的電器維修費用。三者均為需明確分配以避免爭議的常見費用。

question_en: Which of the following is/are the effect(s) of a clause in a provisional agreement for sale and purchase which provides that the vendo r agrees to sell and the purchaser agrees to purchase the property on an “as is” basis? (i) A warranty is given by the vendor that all alte rations made to the property are in compliance with the Buildings Ordin ance as at the date of the provisional agreement for sale and purc hase. (ii) The purchaser accepts to be bound by the tenan cy agreement of the property subsisting at the date of the provisional agreement for sale and purchase. (iii) The purchaser accepts that the property is so ld in such physical state and condition as at the time when the provisional a greement for sale and purchase is made.
question_cn:
以下哪些是臨時買賣合約中「賣方同意出售及買方同意以『現狀』購買物業」條款的效果？
(i) 賣方保證截至臨時買賣合約簽訂之日，物業的所有改動均符合《建築物條例》。
(ii) 買方接受受臨時買賣合約簽訂之日仍然存續的物業租約所約束。
(iii) 買方接受物業以訂立臨時買賣合約時的實際狀況出售。
explanation_en: An 'as is' clause means the purchaser accepts the property in its physical state at the time the PASP is made (iii). It does NOT mean the vendor warrants compliance with the Buildings Ordinance (i). It also does not automatically bind the purchaser to existing tenancies (ii), which is a separate matter. Only (iii) is correct.
explanation_cn: 「現狀」條款意味着買方接受物業以訂立臨時買賣合約時的實際狀況出售(iii)。這並不表示賣方保證符合《建築物條例》(i)。亦不會自動使買方受現有租約約束(ii)，這是另一事項。只有(iii)正確。

question_en: Which of the following are the expectations of the community on the estate agency trade? (i) Estate agents should have sufficient knowledge of the law, and other relevant matters relating to property transactions. (ii) Estate agents should supply clients with corre ct and accurate property information. (iii) Estate agents should protect the interests of clients in carrying out their instructions with due care and due diligence. (iv) Estate agents should not exert undue influence or coercion, but should give clients sufficient time and freedom to make decisions about a property transaction.
question_cn:
以下哪些是社會對地產代理行業的期望？
(i) 地產代理應具備充分的法律知識，以及與物業交易有關的其他相關知識。
(ii) 地產代理應向客戶提供正確及準確的物業資料。
(iii) 地產代理在恪盡謹慎及盡職地執行客戶指示時，應保障客戶的利益。
(iv) 地產代理不應施加不當影響或脅迫，而應給予客戶充分的時間和自由就物業交易作出決定。
explanation_en: The community expects estate agents to: (i) have sufficient knowledge of law and relevant matters, (ii) supply correct and accurate property information, (iii) protect client interests with due care and diligence, and (iv) not exert undue influence but give clients sufficient time for decisions. All four reflect professional standards under the EAO and Code of Ethics.
explanation_cn: 社會對地產代理的期望包括：(i)具備充分的法律及相關知識；(ii)提供正確及準確的物業資料；(iii)以謹慎和盡職保障客戶利益；及(iv)不施加不當影響，給予客戶充分時間作出決定。四者均反映《地產代理條例》及《操守守則》的專業標準。

question_en: Under common law, which of the following are r equired for the formation of a contract? (i) Offer (ii) Acceptance of offer (iii) Intention of the parties to create legal rela tion (iv) Agreement as to how contractual disputes are t o be resolved (v) Consideration for the contract
question_cn:
根據普通法，訂立合約需具備以下哪些要素？
(i) 要約
(ii) 承約
(iii) 雙方訂立法律關係的意圖
(iv) 就如何解決合約糾紛達成協議
(v) 合約的代價
explanation_en: Under common law, the essential elements for contract formation are: (i) offer, (ii) acceptance, (iii) intention to create legal relations, and (v) consideration. Agreement on dispute resolution (iv) is NOT required. A contract can be valid without any dispute resolution clause. The answer is (i), (ii), (iii) and (v) only.
explanation_cn: 根據普通法，訂立合約的基本要素為：(i)要約；(ii)承約；(iii)訂立法律關係的意圖；及(v)代價。就爭議解決達成協議(iv)並非必要。合約在沒有爭議解決條款下仍可有效。答案為僅(i)、(ii)、(iii)及(v)。

question_en: Mr. Chow, an estate agent, made a photocopy of the Hong Kong identity card of his vendor client, John. Without telling John, Mr. Chow made another copy and gave it to a friend who worked as an insurance brok er so that his friend could market his services to John. Mr. Chow then lost his copy of John’s identity card. A week later, John asked Mr. Chow whether he still had the copy of his identity card. Mr. Chow could not produce it. Which of the f ollowing Data Protection Principles under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordina nce might Mr. Chow have breached? (i) Ensuring the accuracy of the personal data coll ected. (ii) Not using personal data for any purpose other than that for which it is collected. (iii) Taking all practicable steps to ensure that p ersonal data held by a data user are protected against unauthorised or acc idental access. (iv) Allowing a data subject to correct his persona l data.
question_cn:
地產代理周先生影印了其賣方客戶John的香港身份證副本。周先生在未通知John的情況下，另外影印了一份副本並交給一位從事保險經紀的朋友，以便其朋友向John推銷保險服務。其後周先生遺失了他持有的John身份證副本。一星期後，John問周先生是否仍持有其身份證副本。周先生未能出示。周先生可能違反了《個人資料（私隱）條例》中以下哪些保障資料原則？
(i) 確保所收集的個人資料準確。
(ii) 不得將個人資料用於收集時的目的以外的用途。
(iii) 採取一切切實可行的步驟，確保資料使用者所持有的個人資料受到保護，以免受未經授權或意外的查閲。
(iv) 容許資料當事人更正其個人資料。
explanation_en: Mr. Chow breached DPP3 (use limitation): he used John's personal data for a purpose other than that for which it was collected, by giving it to an insurance broker. He also breached DPP4 (security): he failed to protect the data against unauthorized access by losing the copy. DPP1 (accuracy) and DPP6 (access/correction) were not breached. The answer is (ii) and (iii).
explanation_cn: 周先生違反了保障資料第3原則（使用限制）：將個人資料用於收集目的以外的用途。亦違反了第4原則（保安）：未能保護資料免受未經授權查閱，遺失了副本。第1原則（準確性）及第6原則（查閱及更正）未被違反。答案為(ii)及(iii)。

question_en: An estate agent received three offers to purcha se a property listed by his client. One interested purchaser (who made the lowest offer ) proposed to the agent that he was prepared to pay the agent an extra commissio n of $30,000 if the agent would not relay the other two offers to the vendor. Which of the following regulations/ordinances might the agent have breache d if he accepts the extra commission and if he does not relay the other two o ffers to the vendor? (i) Unconscionable Contracts Ordinance (ii) Prevention of Bribery Ordinance (iii) Practice Regulation (iv) Estate Agents (Determination of Commission Dis putes) Regulation (v) Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance
question_cn:
一名地產代理收到三個購買其客戶放盤物業的要約。其中一名有意買家（出價最低者）向該代理提議，如果代理不將其餘兩個要約轉達賣方，他願意額外支付代理$30,000佣金。如果該代理接受了額外佣金，並且沒有將其餘兩個要約轉達賣方，他可能違反了以下哪些規例／條例？
(i) 《不合情理合約條例》
(ii) 《防止賄賂條例》
(iii) 《常規規例》
(iv) 《地產代理（釐定佣金爭議）規例》
(v) 《個人資料（私隱）條例》
explanation_en: By accepting the secret commission and not relaying all offers, the agent would breach: (ii) the Prevention of Bribery Ordinance (Cap. 201), as accepting a secret advantage constitutes an offence; and (iii) the Practice Regulation, which requires agents to relay all offers and act in the client's best interests. The other ordinances are not directly relevant.
explanation_cn: 接受秘密佣金並不轉達所有要約，會違反：(ii)《防止賄賂條例》（第201章），接受秘密利益構成罪行；及(iii)《常規規例》，規定代理須轉達所有要約並以客戶最佳利益行事。其他條例與此不直接相關。

question_en: Mr. Chan purchased a “Home Ownership Scheme” fl at from the Hong Kong Housing Authority eight years ago. He now intends t o sell it in the open market, but the premium has yet to be paid. Which of the fo llowing documents relating to the sale must state that, unless the Director of Ho using stipulates otherwise, Mr. Chan must pay a premium to the Hong Kong Housing Au thority within 28 days of the date of the agreement for sale and purchase, and before the assignment?
question_cn: 陳先生八年前從香港房屋委員會購入一個「居者有其屋計劃」單位。他現在打算在公開市場出售該單位，但尚未繳付補價。下列哪份與該出售有關的文件必須列明：除房屋署署長另有規定外，陳先生須於買賣合約日期起計28天內，並在轉讓之前，向香港房屋委員會繳付補價？

options_en.A: The certificate of availability for sale
options_en.B: The certificate of eligibility to purchase
options_en.D: The agreement for sale and purchase

explanation_en: When selling a Home Ownership Scheme flat in the open market where the premium has not been paid, the agreement for sale and purchase must state that the owner must pay a premium to the Housing Authority within 28 days of the ASP date and before the assignment, unless the Director of Housing stipulates otherwise.
explanation_cn: 在公開市場出售尚未繳付補價的居屋單位時，買賣合約必須列明業主須於合約日期起計28天內並在轉讓之前向房委會繳付補價，除非房屋署署長另有規定。

question_en: Generally speaking, if a purchaser fails to com plete a transaction in accordance with the agreement for sale and purchase, which of the following actions may the vendor take? (i) He may forfeit the deposits. (ii) He may terminate the agreement for sale and pu rchase, and resell the property. (iii) He may register a Memorandum of Charge agains t the property at the Land Registry.
question_cn:
一般而言，如買方未能按照買賣合約完成交易，賣方可採取以下哪些行動？
(i) 沒收訂金。
(ii) 終止買賣合約，並將物業重新出售。
(iii) 在土地註冊處就該物業登記一份押記備忘錄。
explanation_en: If a purchaser fails to complete, the vendor may generally: (i) forfeit the deposits as liquidated damages, and (ii) terminate the ASP and resell the property. A Memorandum of Charge (iii) is not a remedy available to the vendor when the purchaser defaults. The correct answer is (i) and (ii) only.
explanation_cn: 如買方未能完成交易，賣方一般可：(i)沒收訂金作為預定損害賠償；及(ii)終止買賣合約並重新出售物業。押記備忘錄(iii)並非買方違約時賣方可用的補救措施。正確答案為僅(i)及(ii)。

question_en: If a purchaser client intends to purchase a pro perty from a confirmor by way of a sub-sale agreement, which of the following is/are t he matter(s) that the estate agent should draw the purchaser client’s attention to in order to protect his interests? (i) whether the agreement for sale and purchase bet ween the head vendor of the property and the confirmor restricts sub-sale (ii) whether the balance of the purchase price paya ble by the client to the confirmor is sufficient to cover the balance of the purchase price payable by the confirmor to the head vendor under t he agreement for sale and purchase between the confirmor and the hea d vendor (iii) whether the client has an opportunity to insp ect the property before he enters into the sub-sale agreement
question_cn:
如果一名買方客戶打算透過確認人以分售合約方式購買一個物業，以下哪些是地產代理應提請買方客戶注意以保障其利益的事項？
(i) 該物業的原業主與確認人之間的買賣合約是否限制分售
(ii) 客戶支付予確認人的樓價餘款是否足以支付確認人在其與原業主的買賣合約下須支付予原業主的樓價餘款
(iii) 客戶在簽訂分售合約之前是否有機會驗看該物業
explanation_en: When purchasing from a confirmor by sub-sale, the agent should draw attention to: (i) whether the head ASP restricts sub-sale, (ii) whether the balance payable is sufficient to cover the confirmor's obligations to the head vendor, and (iii) whether the client can inspect the property. All three are important for protecting the purchaser's interests.
explanation_cn: 透過確認人分售購買物業時，代理應提請注意：(i)原買賣合約是否限制分售；(ii)樓價餘款是否足以支付確認人對原業主的義務；及(iii)客戶是否有機會驗看物業。三者對保障買方利益均十分重要。

question_en: To best protect his client’s interests in the purchase of a property, under which of the following situations should an estate agent adv ise the purchaser to pay the deposit to a firm of solicitors to hold the deposit as stakeholders? (i) where the property is sold subject to an existi ng tenancy (ii) where the property is subject to a mortgage an d the property is negative equity (iii) where the vendor is selling the property as t he surviving joint tenant (iv) where the property is subject to a charging or der (v) where the vendor sells the property as a confir mor
question_cn:
為了最好地保障其客戶在購買物業時的利益，在以下哪些情況下，地產代理應建議買方將訂金支付予一間律師行，由該律師行以權益關係人身份持有訂金？
(i) 物業在現有租約下出售
(ii) 物業設有按揭，且物業屬負資產
(iii) 賣方以尚存的聯權共有人身份出售物業
(iv) 物業受押記令約束
(v) 賣方以確認人身份出售物業
explanation_en: Stakeholding of deposits should be advised when there is risk the vendor cannot complete: (ii) negative equity with mortgage, (iv) charging order against the property, and (v) confirmor sale. An existing tenancy (i) and surviving joint tenant (iii) do not inherently create the same level of risk to deposits. The answer is (ii), (iv) and (v).
explanation_cn: 在賣方可能無法完成交易的風險情況下應建議保證金持有訂金：(ii)負資產連按揭；(iv)物業受押記令約束；及(v)確認人出售。現有租約(i)及尚存聯權共有人(iii)本身不會產生同等風險。答案為(ii)、(iv)及(v)。

question_en: Tommy, an estate agent, has arranged for his pu rchaser client, Mr. Chan, to sign a provisional agreement for sale and purchase of a re sidential property. Two days later, Mr. Chan intends to execute a nomination to nominate his business partner to hold the property together with him as joint ten ants. Which of the following are the proper pieces of advice for Tommy to give t o Mr. Chan? (i) Mr. Chan must execute a deed of gift in favour of his business partner. (ii) Stamp duty is payable on the nomination. (iii) Mr. Chan and his business partner cannot hold the property as joint tenants because only a married couple can be joint tenants. (iv) If Mr. Chan and his business partner hold the property as joint tenants and if Mr. Chan predeceases his business pa rtner, Mr. Chan’s interest in the property will pass to his business partner upon his death.
question_cn:
地產代理Tommy已安排其買方客戶陳先生簽訂一份住宅物業的臨時買賣合約。兩天後，陳先生打算作出提名，提名其商業夥伴與他以聯權共有人身份共同持有該物業。以下哪些是Tommy給予陳先生的正確建議？
(i) 陳先生必須簽立一份送贈契，以其商業夥伴為受惠人。
(ii) 提名須繳付印花稅。
(iii) 陳先生與其商業夥伴不能以聯權共有人身份持有物業，因為只有已婚夫婦才能成為聯權共有人。
(iv) 如陳先生與其商業夥伴以聯權共有人身份持有物業，而陳先生先於其商業夥伴去世，陳先生在物業中的權益將於其去世時轉移予其商業夥伴。
explanation_en: The correct advice is: (ii) stamp duty is payable on a nomination as it is a chargeable instrument; and (iv) under joint tenancy, the right of survivorship applies. Statement (i) is wrong as a nomination is not a deed of gift. Statement (iii) is wrong because joint tenancy is not restricted to married couples. The answer is (ii) and (iv).
explanation_cn: 正確建議為：(ii)提名須繳付印花稅；及(iv)在聯權共有下，尚存者取得權適用。陳述(i)不正確，提名並非饋贈契。陳述(iii)不正確，聯權共有並非僅限於已婚夫婦。答案為(ii)及(iv)。

question_en: If an estate agent intends to include the floor area information in the advertisement of a residential property and if the saleable area of the property can be obtained from the Rating and Valuation Depar tment or the agreement for sale and purchase of the first assignment, accordin g to the guidelines in the Practice Circular in relation to the provision of f loor area information for second-hand residential properties, which of the fo llowing must the estate agent do? (i) The estate agent must provide the saleable area of the property in the advertisement. (ii) The estate agent must provide both the saleable are a and the gr oss floor area of the property in the advertisement. (iii) The estate agent must clearly state in the advertisement that the floor area provided is the saleable area of the pro perty. (iv) The estate agent must clearly state in the advertisement the source of the floor area provided.
question_cn:
如地產代理擬在住宅物業的廣告中加入樓面面積資料，而該物業的實用面積可從差餉物業估價署或第一份轉讓契的買賣合約中取得，根據有關提供二手住宅物業樓面面積資料的執業通告中的指引，地產代理必須做到以下哪些事項？
(i) 地產代理必須在廣告中提供該物業的實用面積。
(ii) 地產代理必須在廣告中同時提供該物業的實用面積和建築面積。
(iii) 地產代理必須在廣告中清楚列明所提供的樓面面積為該物業的實用面積。
(iv) 地產代理必須在廣告中清楚列明所提供的樓面面積的來源。
explanation_en: According to the EAA Practice Circular on floor area for second-hand residential properties, when saleable area is available, the agent must: (i) provide the saleable area, (iii) clearly state it is the saleable area, and (iv) state the source. There is no requirement to provide both saleable and gross floor area (ii). The answer is (i), (iii) and (iv).
explanation_cn: 根據有關二手住宅物業樓面面積的執業通告，當實用面積可取得時，代理必須：(i)提供實用面積；(iii)清楚列明為實用面積；及(iv)列明來源。無需同時提供建築面積(ii)。答案為(i)、(iii)及(iv)。

question_en: FILL IN THE BLANKS: Please choose the correct answer from A to E. The f irst part of the answers applies to the first blank and the second part appl ies to the second blank. To prove title to a property, the vendor is require d to produce to the purchaser the government lease as well as proof of title extendin g not less than ___ years before the date of the agreement for sale and purch ase commencing with an _____, a mortgage by assignment or a legal charge, each dealing with the whole estate and interest in that property.
question_cn: 填充題：請從 A 至 E 中選擇正確答案。答案的第一部分適用於第一個空格，第二部分適用於第二個空格。為證明物業的業權，賣方須向買方出示政府租契，以及在買賣合約日期前不少於___年的業權證明，由一份_____、按揭轉讓契或法定押記開始，每份文件均涉及該物業的全部產業權及權益。
explanation_en: Under the Conveyancing and Property Ordinance (Cap. 219), s.13, the vendor must produce proof of title extending not less than 15 years before the date of the ASP, commencing with an assignment, a mortgage by assignment, or a legal charge dealing with the whole estate and interest in the property.
explanation_cn: 根據《物業轉易及財產條例》（第219章）第13條，賣方須出示在買賣合約日期前不少於15年的業權證明，由一份轉讓契、按揭轉讓契或法定押記開始。

question_en: The purchaser client of an estate agent is abou t to enter into a provisional agreement for sale and purchase of a property owned by a private limited Hong Kong company. The client wants to check whether the property is subject to any mortgages or charges. Which of the following docume nts may contain the above information? (i) the memorandum of association of the vendor com pany (ii) an up-to-date land search of the property at t he Land Registry (iii) an up-to-date search of the Mortgage or Charg e Details/Statement of Particulars of Charge filed by the vendor company w ith the Companies Registry (iv) the Certificate of Incorporation of the vendor company (v) the Business Registration Certificate of the ve ndor company
question_cn:
一名地產代理的買方客戶即將就一間由香港私人有限公司擁有的物業簽訂臨時買賣合約。該客戶想查核該物業是否設有任何按揭或押記。以下哪些文件可能載有上述資料？
(i) 賣方公司的組織章程大綱
(ii) 在土地註冊處就該物業進行的最新查冊
(iii) 賣方公司在公司註冊處存檔的最新按揭或押記詳情／押記事項說明書查冊
(iv) 賣方公司的公司註冊證書
(v) 賣方公司的商業登記證
explanation_en: To check whether a company-owned property is subject to mortgages or charges: (ii) an up-to-date land search shows all registered encumbrances, and (iii) a Companies Registry search of mortgage/charge details shows charges registered by the company. The memorandum of association (i), Certificate of Incorporation (iv), and Business Registration Certificate (v) do not contain this information.
explanation_cn: 要查核公司物業是否設有按揭或押記：(ii)最新土地查冊顯示所有已登記產權負擔；(iii)公司註冊處的按揭或押記查冊顯示公司登記的押記。組織章程大綱(i)、公司註冊證書(iv)及商業登記證(v)均不載有此資料。

question_en: Leo (a landlord) intends to enter into a tenanc y agreement of a residential property with Tina (a tenant) for a term of one yea r. The land search of the property shows the following registered documents: (i) a legal charge registered by a mortgagee bank (ii) a second legal charge registered by a finance company (iii) a memorandum of a charge of outstanding manag ement fees registered by the management company of the buildin g of which the property forms a part (iv) a building order of the property registered by the Building Authority As Tina’s estate agent, you should advise Tina to r equire Leo to obtain the consent of which of the following before entering i nto the tenancy agreement?
question_cn:
業主Leo打算與租客Tina就一個住宅物業訂立一份為期一年的租賃協議。該物業的查冊顯示以下已登記的文件：
(i) 由承按銀行登記的法定押記
(ii) 由財務公司登記的第二法定押記
(iii) 由該物業所在大廈的管理公司登記的欠繳管理費押記備忘錄
(iv) 由建築事務監督登記的該物業的建築命令
作為Tina的地產代理，你應建議Tina要求Leo在簽訂租賃協議之前取得以下哪方的同意？

options_en.C: The mortgagee bank in (i) and the finance compan y in (ii) only

options_cn.C: 僅 (i) 中的承按銀行及 (ii) 中的財務公司
options_cn.E: 僅 (iv) 中的建築事務監督

explanation_en: When a property has legal charges registered, the tenant should require the landlord to obtain consent from all mortgagees before entering into a tenancy. Both the mortgagee bank (i) and the finance company with the second charge (ii) should give consent, as mortgage terms typically restrict letting. The management company and Building Authority do not need to consent to a tenancy.
explanation_cn: 當物業有法定押記登記時，租客應要求業主取得所有承按人的同意。(i)承按銀行及(ii)持有第二法定押記的財務公司均應給予同意，因為按揭條款通常限制出租。管理公司及建築事務監督無需就租約給予同意。

question_en: Which of the following information may be found in the occupation permit of a building? (i) gross floor area of the building (ii) permitted user of the units of the building (iii) term of the relevant Government Lease (iv) saleable area of the building
question_cn:
以下哪些資料可在一幢大廈的入伙紙中找到？
(i) 大廈的建築面積
(ii) 大廈各單位的許可用途
(iii) 有關政府租契的年期
(iv) 大廈的實用面積
explanation_en: An occupation permit typically contains: (i) the gross floor area of the building, and (ii) the permitted use of units. It does not contain the Government Lease term (iii) or the saleable area (iv), which is calculated by the Rating and Valuation Department. The answer is (i) and (ii) only.
explanation_cn: 入伙紙通常載有：(i)大廈建築面積；及(ii)各單位許可用途。不載有政府租契年期(iii)或實用面積(iv)，後者由差餉物業估價署計算。答案為僅(i)及(ii)。

question_en: A purchaser asks his estate agent to find out t he permitted use of the unbuilt land adjacent to the property which he intends to purcha se. The unbuilt land has been bought by a developer. The estate agent may obtain the information about the permitted user of the unbuilt land in which of the following documents? (i) the “Outline Zoning Plan” which includes the un built land (ii) the land search of the property which the purc haser intends to purchase (iii) the Government lease of the unbuilt land
question_cn:
一名買家請其地產代理查找其擬購買物業旁邊一幅未建土地的許可用途。該未建土地已被一名發展商購入。地產代理可從以下哪些文件中取得該未建土地的許可用途資料？
(i) 包含該未建土地的「分區計劃大綱圖」
(ii) 買家擬購買的物業的查冊
(iii) 該未建土地的政府租契
explanation_en: To find the permitted use of unbuilt land: (i) the Outline Zoning Plan shows zoning and permitted uses, and (iii) the Government lease specifies permitted use under lease conditions. The land search of the property the purchaser intends to buy (ii) only shows encumbrances on that property, not permitted use of adjacent land. The answer is (i) and (iii).
explanation_cn: 要查找未建土地的許可用途：(i)分區計劃大綱圖顯示規劃及許可用途；(iii)政府租契列明租契條件下的許可用途。買家擬購物業的查冊(ii)只顯示該物業的產權負擔，非相鄰土地的許可用途。答案為(i)及(iii)。

question_en: Generally speaking, which of the following info rmation may be found in the deed of mutual covenant of a building? (i) the name of the first purchaser who purchased a unit/units in the building (ii) the allocation of undivided shares to the vari ous parts of the building (iii) the parts which are designated as common area s in the building (iv) the share of management fees that each owner o f a unit in the building is liable to pay
question_cn:
一般而言，以下哪些資料可在一幢大廈的公契中找到？
(i) 購買該大廈單位的第一名買家的姓名
(ii) 大廈各部分的不可分割份數的分配
(iii) 大廈中被指定為公用地方的部分
(iv) 大廈內每位業主須繳付的管理費份額
explanation_en: A DMC typically contains: (i) the first purchaser's name, (ii) allocation of undivided shares, (iii) designation of common areas, and (iv) each owner's share of management fees. All four items are generally found in a DMC.
explanation_cn: 公契通常載有：(i)首位買家姓名；(ii)不可分割份數分配；(iii)公用地方指定；及(iv)每位業主的管理費份額。四項資料一般均可在公契中找到。

question_en: Which of the following is/are the proper step(s ) that the owner of a private residential flat should take if he intends to demol ish a structural wall in his flat? (i) Notify the Lands Department in writing about th e intended works. (ii) Seek the approval of the Housing Department fo r the intended works. (iii) Appoint an “authorised person” under the Buil dings Ordinance to prepare and submit plans for the works for approval by the Building Authority.
question_cn:
如果一個私人住宅單位的業主打算拆除其單位內的一幅結構牆，他應採取以下哪些適當步驟？
(i) 就擬進行的工程以書面方式通知地政總署。
(ii) 就擬進行的工程取得房屋署的批准。
(iii) 委任《建築物條例》下的「認可人士」擬備並提交工程圖則，以供建築事務監督批准。
explanation_en: Demolishing a structural wall requires approval under the Buildings Ordinance. The owner must appoint an 'authorised person' to prepare and submit plans for approval by the Building Authority (iii). There is no requirement to notify the Lands Department (i) or seek Housing Department approval (ii) for private residential structural works.
explanation_cn: 拆除結構牆需根據《建築物條例》獲得批准。業主必須委任「認可人士」擬備並提交圖則以供建築事務監督批准(iii)。無需通知地政總署(i)或取得房屋署批准(ii)。

question_en: A property whose permitted user is “garage” has been used as a shop. The purchaser is aware of the permitted user but believ es that he can in the meantime continue to use the property as a shop. Which of th e following statements is/are correct? (i) The Building Authority may, by order, require t he owner or the occupier to discontinue the use of the property as a shop. (ii) The Building Authority may prohibit the use of the property as a shop on the ground that the property is not suitabl e for such use. (iii) The unauthorised change of user may render th e title of the property defective.
question_cn:
一個許可用途為「車庫」的物業一直被用作商店。買方知悉該許可用途，但相信他可以同時繼續將該物業用作商店。以下哪些陳述是正確的？
(i) 建築事務監督可藉命令要求業主或佔用人停止將該物業用作商店。
(ii) 建築事務監督可以該物業不適合作此用途為由，禁止將該物業用作商店。
(iii) 未經授權更改用途可能導致該物業的業權出現瑕疵。
explanation_en: All three are correct. (i) The Building Authority may order discontinuation of unauthorized use. (ii) The Building Authority may prohibit use on grounds the property is unsuitable. (iii) Unauthorized change of use may render the title defective as it may breach the government lease or occupation permit conditions.
explanation_cn: 三項均正確。(i)建築事務監督可命令停止未經授權的用途。(ii)建築事務監督可以物業不適合為由禁止該用途。(iii)未經授權更改用途可能導致業權瑕疵，因為可能違反政府租契或入伙紙條件。

question_en: A valuation report usually contains which of th e following information? (i) level of mortgage rate (ii) date of valuation (iii) valuation of the property (iv) fee for the report
question_cn:
估價報告通常包含以下哪些資料？
(i) 按揭利率水平
(ii) 估價日期
(iii) 物業的估值
(iv) 報告的費用
explanation_en: A standard property valuation report contains the date of valuation and the valuation figure (market value) of the property. It does not typically include the mortgage interest rate level (which is a banking matter) or the fee charged for preparing the report itself.
explanation_cn: 標準物業估價報告包含估價日期及物業的估值（市場價值）。報告通常不包括按揭利率水平（此屬銀行事務）或編製報告的費用。這些是估價師必須納入報告的基本要素，以使報告具有意義。

question_en: Under what circumstances would you consider the “Market Comparison Method” of valuation to be the most reliable? (i) when general property prices have gone up by m ore than 50% in the past twelve months (ii) when there are steady and substantial monthly transactions of similar properties in the market (iii) when properties in a particular sector of th e market have a high level of physical similarity
question_cn:
在甚麼情況下你會認為「市場比較法」是最可靠的估價方法？
(i) 過去十二個月一般物業價格上升超過50%
(ii) 市場上有穩定且大量的同類物業每月成交
(iii) 某一市場範疇的物業在實體上具有高度相似性
explanation_en: The Market Comparison Method is most reliable when there are steady and substantial transactions of comparable properties (providing sufficient data points) and when properties have a high level of physical similarity (making comparisons meaningful). A market with prices surging over 50% in twelve months is volatile, which actually undermines the reliability of this method as comparables become quickly outdated.
explanation_cn: 市場比較法在有穩定且大量的同類物業成交（提供充足的數據點）以及物業在實體上具有高度相似性（使比較具有意義）的情況下最為可靠。若過去十二個月物業價格飆升超過50%，市場波動劇烈，反而會削弱此方法的可靠性，因為可比較的交易數據很快便會過時。

question_en: Calculate the stamp duty chargeable for a tenan cy agreement for a domestic property (including its counterpart) based on the f ollowing terms: Term: five years Rent: $100,000 per month Rent-free period: first two months Option to renew: a further term of three years at $120,000 per month
question_cn:
根據以下條款計算一份住宅物業租賃協議（包括其副本）應繳的印花稅：
年期：五年
租金：每月$100,000
免租期：首兩個月
續租選擇權：再續三年，月租$120,000
explanation_en: Under the Stamp Duty Ordinance, for a lease exceeding 3 years, the stamp duty rate is 1% of the average yearly rent. The average yearly rent is: total rent ($100,000 x 58 months = $5,800,000) divided by 5 years = $1,160,000. Stamp duty = 1% x $1,160,000 = $11,600, plus $5 for the counterpart = $11,605.
explanation_cn: 根據《印花稅條例》，租期超過3年的租約，印花稅率為年租平均值的1%。年租平均值計算：總租金（$100,000 x 58個月 = $5,800,000）除以5年 = 每年$1,160,000。印花稅 = 1% x $1,160,000 = $11,600，加上副本$5，總計$11,605。

question_en: Susan (a landlord) and David (a tenant) entered into a residential tenancy agreement for a term of two years commencing on 1 O ctober 2013. The tenancy agreement does not have any express term which give s Susan the right of forfeiture for non-payment of rent. If David fails to pay his rent, can Susan forfeit the tenancy?
question_cn: 業主Susan與租客David就一個住宅物業訂立一份為期兩年的租賃協議，由2013年10月1日起計。該租賃協議並無任何明示條款賦予Susan因欠租而終止租約的權利。如David未能繳付租金，Susan可否終止該租約？

options_en.A: Yes, if David fails to pay rent within seven day s of the date when the rent falls due.
options_en.B: Yes, if David fails to pay rent within ten days of the date when the rent falls due.
options_en.C: Yes, if David fails to pay rent within fourteen days of the date when the rent falls due.
options_en.D: Yes, if David fails to pay rent within fifteen d ays of the date when the rent falls due.

options_cn.A: 可以，如David在租金到期日後七天內仍未繳付租金。
options_cn.B: 可以，如David在租金到期日後十天內仍未繳付租金。
options_cn.C: 可以，如David在租金到期日後十四天內仍未繳付租金。
options_cn.D: 可以，如David在租金到期日後十五天內仍未繳付租金。

explanation_en: Under section 58(1) of the Conveyancing and Property Ordinance (Cap. 219), even without an express forfeiture clause, the landlord has an implied right to forfeit the tenancy if the tenant fails to pay rent within 15 days after it becomes due. This statutory implied right protects landlords in the absence of an express provision.
explanation_cn: 根據《物業轉易及財產條例》（第219章）第58(1)條，即使沒有明示的終止租約條款，如租客在租金到期後15天內仍未繳付租金，業主有法定默示權利終止租約。此法定默示權利在沒有明示條款的情況下保障業主。

question_en: A tenant has entered into a tenancy agreement f or a term of two years with the option to renew for a further term of two years. In order to protect the tenant’s interests, which of the following steps should the estate agent advise the tenant to take? (i) The tenant shall let the estate agent sign the tenancy agreement for him. (ii) The tenancy agreement should be stamped. (iii) The tenancy agreement should be registered wi th the Land Registry. (iv) The tenancy agreement should be filed with the Buildings Department.
question_cn:
一名租客已簽訂一份為期兩年的租賃協議，附有再續兩年的續租選擇權。為保障租客的利益，地產代理應建議租客採取以下哪些步驟？
(i) 租客應讓地產代理代其簽署租賃協議。
(ii) 租賃協議應繳付印花稅。
(iii) 租賃協議應在土地註冊處註冊。
(iv) 租賃協議應向屋宇署存檔。
explanation_en: To protect the tenant's interests, the tenancy agreement should be stamped (required by the Stamp Duty Ordinance; an unstamped agreement is inadmissible as evidence) and registered at the Land Registry (to protect the tenant's interest against subsequent purchasers under the Land Registration Ordinance). Letting an agent sign on behalf is not advisable, and filing with the Buildings Department is irrelevant.
explanation_cn: 為保障租客利益，租賃協議應繳付印花稅（《印花稅條例》要求；未繳印花稅的協議不可在法庭上用作證據）並在土地註冊處註冊（根據《土地註冊條例》保障租客權益，對抗其後買家）。讓代理代為簽署並不可取，向屋宇署存檔亦與保障租約無關。

question_en: Ken has recently let his flat to his friend, J oyce. They entered into a tenancy agreement whereby Ken was to let the flat to Joyce for two years from 15 June 2013 for domestic use at a monthly rent of $10,000 payable on the 15 th day of each month. The tenancy agreement did not contain a ny clause which prohibited sub-letting. Under the Landlord and Tenant (Consoli dation) Ordinance, Ken may forfeit the tenancy in which of the following circu mstances? (i) if Joyce sublets the flat to her friend (ii) if Joyce uses the property for illegal purpose s (iii) if Joyce causes unnecessary annoyance to her neighbours (iv) if Joyce makes any structural alterations to t he property without Ken’s prior written consent
question_cn:
Ken最近將其單位出租予朋友Joyce。他們簽訂了一份租賃協議，由Ken將該單位出租予Joyce作住宅用途，為期兩年，由2013年6月15日起計，月租$10,000，於每月15日繳付。該租賃協議並無任何禁止分租的條款。根據《業主與租客（綜合）條例》，在以下哪些情況下Ken可終止該租約？
(i) 如Joyce將該單位分租予其朋友
(ii) 如Joyce將該物業用作非法用途
(iii) 如Joyce對鄰居造成不必要的滋擾
(iv) 如Joyce未經Ken事先書面同意而對該物業進行任何結構性改動
explanation_en: Under Part IV of the Landlord and Tenant (Consolidation) Ordinance (Cap. 7), a landlord has implied grounds to forfeit a domestic tenancy if the tenant uses premises for illegal purposes, causes unnecessary annoyance to neighbours, or makes structural alterations without the landlord's prior written consent. Since the tenancy has no clause prohibiting sub-letting, sub-letting would not constitute grounds for forfeiture.
explanation_cn: 根據《業主與租客（綜合）條例》（第7章）第IV部，如租客將物業用作非法用途、對鄰居造成不必要的滋擾，或未經業主事先書面同意進行結構性改動，業主有默示的終止租約理由。由於租約無禁止分租條款，分租不構成終止租約的理由。

question_en: Which of the following is NOT a usual clause in a tenancy agreement for domestic premises?
question_cn: 以下哪項並非住宅物業租賃協議中的常見條款？

options_en.A: The tenant shall permit the landlord and all his authorised persons to enter and view the state of the property and to carry out any required works at all reasonable times with prior notice.
options_en.B: The tenant shall not assign, underlet or part wi th possession of the property or any part of it.
options_en.C: The tenant shall keep and maintain the interior of the property in good condition (fair wear and tear excepted).
options_en.D: The tenant shall keep and maintain the exterior and the structure of the property in good condition (fair wear and tear exce pted).
options_en.E: The tenant shall pay the utility charges (e.g. electricity and water charges) of the property.

options_cn.A: 租客須容許業主及其所有獲授權人士在事先通知的情況下，於所有合理時間進入及查看物業狀況，並進行任何所需工程。
options_cn.B: 租客不得將物業或其任何部分轉讓、分租或放棄管有。
options_cn.C: 租客須保持及維修物業內部於良好狀況（合理損耗除外）。
options_cn.D: 租客須保持及維修物業外部及結構於良好狀況（合理損耗除外）。
options_cn.E: 租客須繳付物業的公用事業費用（如電費及水費）。

explanation_en: Maintaining the exterior and structure of a property is typically the landlord's responsibility, not the tenant's. A standard domestic tenancy agreement would not include such a clause. The other options (landlord's right of entry, prohibition on assignment/sub-letting, interior maintenance by tenant, utility charges by tenant) are all usual clauses.
explanation_cn: 維修物業外部及結構通常是業主的責任，而非租客的責任。標準住宅租賃協議不會包含此條款。其他選項（業主進入權、禁止轉讓／分租、租客維修內部、租客繳付公用事業費用）均為常見條款。

question_en: Under which of the following circumstances shou ld a Form CR109 be lodged with the Rating and Valuation Department? (i) where there is a new letting of residential pre mises (ii) where there is a renewal of an existing tenanc y of residential premises (iii) where the tenant surrenders the tenancy of re sidential premises (iv) where there is a new letting of commercial pre mises
question_cn:
在以下哪些情況下須向差餉物業估價署提交表格CR109？
(i) 住宅物業有新租約
(ii) 住宅物業現有租約獲得續期
(iii) 租客交回住宅物業的租約
(iv) 商業物業有新租約
explanation_en: Form CR109 must be lodged with the Rating and Valuation Department for new lettings of residential premises (i), renewals of existing residential tenancies (ii), and surrenders of residential tenancies (iii). Commercial lettings (iv) are not subject to the CR109 requirement, as this form relates to provisions under the Landlord and Tenant (Consolidation) Ordinance for domestic premises.
explanation_cn: 表格CR109必須在住宅物業有新租約 (i)、現有住宅租約續期 (ii) 及租客交回住宅租約 (iii) 時向差餉物業估價署提交。商業物業租約 (iv) 無須提交CR109，因為此表格涉及《業主與租客（綜合）條例》中適用於住宅物業的條文。

question_en: Which of the following are measures that the ma nager of an estate agency firm should adopt in order to help prevent or detect mon ey laundering and/or financing of terrorism? (i) Take note of the statements issued by the Finan cial Action Task Force on Money Laundering from time to time, and in crease scrutiny and enhance due diligence in respect of tr ansactions associated with countries or districts considered t o be at higher risk of money laundering or financing of terrorism. (ii) Examine the prescribed estate agency agreement to ensure that the name of the corporate client’s signatory and the pa rticulars of his identity or travel document have been properly reco rded when arranging for the sale and purchase of a property f or a corporate client. (iii) State in the prescribed estate agency agreeme nt the address of the property transacted, the transaction price, and the date of the signing of the provisional agreement for sale and purchase. (iv) Retain the prescribed estate agency agreement for at least five years from the date of the signing of the provisional agr eement for sale and purchase. (v) Provide copies of all estate agency agreements to the police for record keeping.
question_cn:
以下哪些是地產代理公司的經理應採取的措施，以協助防止或偵測洗黑錢及／或恐怖分子資金籌集活動？
(i) 留意打擊清洗黑錢財務行動特別組織不時發出的聲明，並加強審查及提升對與被視為洗黑錢或恐怖分子資金籌集風險較高的國家或地區有關的交易的盡職調查。
(ii) 在為企業客戶安排物業買賣時，檢查訂明的地產代理協議，確保企業客戶簽署人的姓名及其身份證明文件或旅行證件的詳情已妥為記錄。
(iii) 在訂明的地產代理協議中列明交易物業的地址、成交價及臨時買賣合約的簽署日期。
(iv) 由臨時買賣合約簽署之日起，將訂明的地產代理協議保存最少五年。
(v) 將所有地產代理協議的副本提供予警方備案。
explanation_en: Under the EAA's anti-money laundering guidelines, a manager should: (i) monitor FATF statements and enhance due diligence for high-risk jurisdictions, (ii) verify corporate client signatory details, (iii) record transaction details in the estate agency agreement, and (iv) retain records for at least 5 years. Providing all agreements to police for routine record-keeping (v) is not a standard AML requirement.
explanation_cn: 根據地產代理監管局的反洗黑錢指引，經理應：(i) 留意FATF聲明並加強對高風險地區的盡職調查；(ii) 核實企業客戶簽署人資料；(iii) 在地產代理協議中記錄交易詳情；及 (iv) 將記錄保存最少五年。將所有協議副本提供予警方作日常備案 (v) 並非標準反洗黑錢要求。

question_en: Peter is the manager of a branch office of Wond erful Estate Agency. In order to ensure that a proper information technology (“IT”) system is in place in compliance with legal requirements and to protect p ersonal data, which of the following is/are the proper step(s) that Peter shou ld take in discharge of his duty to provide effective management and control? (i) Prohibit the use of pirated software. (ii) Devise and implement procedures to reduce info rmation security risks. (iii) Include terms in the contract with the IT con tractor to safeguard the confidentiality of the data in the computer system.
question_cn:
Peter是宏達地產代理公司一間分行的經理。為確保設有符合法律要求的妥善資訊科技（「IT」）系統，以及保護個人資料，以下哪些是Peter在履行其提供有效管理及控制的職責時應採取的適當步驟？
(i) 禁止使用盜版軟件。
(ii) 制定及實施程序以減低資訊保安風險。
(iii) 在與IT承辦商的合約中加入條款，以保障電腦系統中資料的機密性。
explanation_en: All three steps are proper measures: prohibiting pirated software ensures legal compliance (Copyright Ordinance), devising procedures to reduce information security risks protects personal data (Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance), and including confidentiality terms in IT contractor contracts safeguards data. These are all part of effective management and control duties.
explanation_cn: 三項措施均屬適當：禁止使用盜版軟件確保遵守法律（《版權條例》），制定程序減低資訊保安風險可保護個人資料（《個人資料（私隱）條例》），在IT承辦商合約中加入保密條款可保障資料安全。這些均屬有效管理及控制職責的一部分。

question_en: Which of the following statements concerning th e management of an estate agency business are correct? (i) Management must ensure that any person who sign s a provisional agreement for sale and purchase as the witness is t he holder of an estate agent’s licence. (ii) Management must ensure that the business at ea ch office of the estate agency is under the effective and separate c ontrol of a manager. (iii) Management must not employ any unlicensed per son to do estate agency work. (iv) Management must notify the Estate Agents Autho rity in every case of transfer of a licensed estate agent from one bra nch office to another.
question_cn:
以下哪些有關地產代理業務管理的陳述是正確的？
(i) 管理層必須確保任何在臨時買賣合約上作為見證人簽署的人士持有地產代理牌照。
(ii) 管理層必須確保地產代理每間辦事處的業務均由一名經理進行有效及獨立的控制。
(iii) 管理層不得僱用任何無牌人士從事地產代理工作。
(iv) 管理層必須在每次將一名持牌地產代理由一間分行調往另一間分行時通知地產代理監管局。
explanation_en: Under the EAO, management must ensure each office is under effective and separate control of a manager (ii), and must not employ unlicensed persons for estate agency work (iii). Statement (i) is incorrect as salesperson licence holders can also witness a PASP. Statement (iv) is incorrect as the EAO does not require notification for every internal transfer between branches.
explanation_cn: 根據《地產代理條例》，管理層必須確保每間辦事處由一名經理有效及獨立控制 (ii)，且不得僱用無牌人士從事地產代理工作 (iii)。陳述 (i) 不正確，營業員牌照持有人亦可見證臨時買賣合約。陳述 (iv) 不正確，條例不要求每次分行間調動均須通知監管局。

question_en: Two weeks ago, YY Estate Agency Limited employe d Mimi as a salesperson. One week ago, Lily, a licensed estate agent, was ap pointed as the manager for the effective and separate control of the business of t he branch office of YY Estate Agency Limited at Connaught Road (“the Connaught Ro ad Branch Office”). Yesterday, YY Estate Agency Limited appointed Simon as its director and posted Bo Bo, a salesperson, from the head office to the C onnaught Road Branch Office. Under the Estate Agents Ordinance, which of the fol lowing matters must YY Estate Agency Limited notify the Estate Agents Auth ority of? (i) Mimi’s employment as a salesperson (ii) Lily’s appointment as a manager of the Connaug ht Road Branch Office (iii) Simon’s appointment as a director of the comp any (iv) Bo Bo’s posting from the head office to the Co nnaught Road Branch Office
question_cn:
兩星期前，YY地產代理有限公司聘用Mimi為營業員。一星期前，持牌地產代理Lily獲委任為YY地產代理有限公司干諾道分行（「干諾道分行」）業務的有效及獨立控制的經理。昨天，YY地產代理有限公司委任Simon為公司董事，並將營業員Bo Bo由總行調往干諾道分行。根據《地產代理條例》，YY地產代理有限公司必須就以下哪些事項通知地產代理監管局？
(i) Mimi受聘為營業員
(ii) Lily獲委任為干諾道分行經理
(iii) Simon獲委任為公司董事
(iv) Bo Bo由總行調往干諾道分行
explanation_en: Under the EAO, an estate agency company must notify the EAA of: employment of a new salesperson (i), appointment of a branch manager (ii), and appointment of a new director (iii). These are prescribed changes affecting licence conditions. Internal posting of a salesperson between offices (iv) does not require EAA notification.
explanation_cn: 根據《地產代理條例》，地產代理公司必須通知監管局：聘用新營業員 (i)、委任分行經理 (ii) 及委任新董事 (iii)。這些均屬影響牌照條件的訂明變更。營業員在辦事處間的內部調動 (iv) 無須通知監管局。

question_en: Under the Estate Agents Ordinance, an estate ag ent who employs a person who is not the holder of a licence to do estate agency wor k may: (i) be subject to disciplinary sanctions by the Est ate Agents Authority (ii) be sued by any person who has suffered loss or damage by reason of his employment of the unlicensed person to do estat e agency work (iii) have committed a criminal offence under the E state Agents Ordinance
question_cn:
根據《地產代理條例》，地產代理僱用非持牌人士從事地產代理工作，可能：
(i) 被地產代理監管局施加紀律處分
(ii) 被任何因其僱用無牌人士從事地產代理工作而蒙受損失或損害的人士提出民事訴訟
(iii) 已觸犯《地產代理條例》下的刑事罪行

options_en.E: (i), (ii) and (iii) Case Study Amy Chan (“Amy”) was the owner of a residential fla t at Unit 8, 5 th Floor, Ko Fung Court, No. 1 Ko Fung Street, Hong Kong (“the Proper ty”). She decided to sell the Property because she was in financial trouble. On 5 January 2013, Amy made a call to Sunlight

explanation_en: Under the EAO, employing an unlicensed person to do estate agency work carries all three consequences: (i) disciplinary sanctions by the EAA, (ii) civil liability to persons who suffered loss, and (iii) criminal liability under section 44 of the EAO. This reflects the serious nature of employing unlicensed persons.
explanation_cn: 根據《地產代理條例》，僱用無牌人士從事地產代理工作會產生三種後果：(i) 被監管局施加紀律處分；(ii) 對蒙受損失的人士承擔民事責任；及 (iii) 觸犯第44條下的刑事罪行。這反映了僱用無牌人士的嚴重性。

question_en: For the purpose of completing the Property Infor mation Form (Form 1), which of the following are the current and subsisting encumb rances of the Property as found in the land search in the Annex ? (i) Mortgage Memorial No. UB6551093 (ii) Sealed Copy Order Imposing Charge on Land: Not ice to Show Cause Memorial No. UB6634446 (iii) Sealed Copy of Charging Order Absolute Memori al No. UB6665515 (iv) Legal Charge Memorial No. 07101300960099 (v) Memorandum Memorial No. 12122300150651
question_cn:
為填寫物業資料表格（表格1），根據附件中的查冊，以下哪些是該物業現存的產權負擔？
(i) 按揭備忘錄編號 UB6551093
(ii) 經蓋印的法庭命令（對土地施加押記：因由陳述書）備忘錄編號 UB6634446
(iii) 經蓋印的絕對押記令副本備忘錄編號 UB6665515
(iv) 法定押記備忘錄編號 07101300960099
(v) 備忘錄編號 12122300150651
explanation_en: In this case study, the earlier mortgage (i) and the notice to show cause (ii) would have been discharged or superseded. The current subsisting encumbrances are the Charging Order Absolute (iii), the Legal Charge (iv), and the Memorandum (v). Only encumbrances currently in force should be disclosed on Form 1.
explanation_cn: 在此個案中，較早的按揭 (i) 及因由陳述書 (ii) 已被解除或取代。現存的產權負擔為絕對押記令 (iii)、法定押記 (iv) 及備忘錄 (v)。只有現時有效的產權負擔才須在表格1中披露。

question_en: According to the land search in the Annex , who is the present mortgagee of the Property?
question_cn: 根據附件中的查冊，該物業現時的承按人是誰？
explanation_en: Based on the case study's land search, the most recent legal charge identifies Shark Finance Co. Ltd. as the current mortgagee/chargee. Earlier mortgages to other banks would have been discharged. The present mortgagee is the party holding the most recent subsisting charge on the property.
explanation_cn: 根據個案研究的查冊，最新的法定押記顯示Shark Finance Co. Ltd.為現時的承按人。較早期向其他銀行的按揭已被解除。現時的承按人是持有該物業最新現存押記的一方。

question_en: For the purpose of completing the information on the saleable area of the Property in the Property Information Form (Form 1), which of the following is the prescribed source for such information?
question_cn: 為在物業資料表格（表格1）中填寫該物業的實用面積資料，以下哪項是該資料的訂明來源？

options_en.B: Deed of Mutual Covenants with Plans Memorial No. UB4393909
options_en.E: The “Property Information Online” service provid ed by the Rating and Valuation Department

options_cn.A: 入伙紙備忘錄編號 UB3393906
options_cn.B: 公契連圖則備忘錄編號 UB4393909
options_cn.C: 轉讓契備忘錄編號 UB4104510
options_cn.D: 轉讓契備忘錄編號 UB4553822
options_cn.E: 差餉物業估價署提供的「物業資訊網」服務

explanation_en: Under the Practice Regulation, the prescribed source for saleable area information in Form 1 is the Rating and Valuation Department's Property Information Online service. This is the officially designated source providing standardised saleable area measurements.
explanation_cn: 根據《常規規例》，在表格1中填寫實用面積資料的訂明來源是差餉物業估價署提供的「物業資訊網」服務。這是官方指定的來源，提供標準化的實用面積量度數據。

question_en: With regard to Memorandum Memorial No. 121223001 50651, which of the following statements is/are probably correct? (i) Management fees for the Property have not been paid. (ii) Ko Fung Properties Management Limited was the party which registered this instrument in the Land Registry. (iii) The Property can be assigned only after the c onsent of Ko Fung Properties Management Limited has been obtained. (iv) This Memorandum would cease to have effect upo n the sale of the Property.
question_cn:
就備忘錄編號 12122300150651 而言，以下哪些陳述可能是正確的？
(i) 該物業的管理費尚未繳付。
(ii) 高豐物業管理有限公司是在土地註冊處登記此文書的一方。
(iii) 該物業只能在取得高豐物業管理有限公司同意後才可轉讓。
(iv) 此備忘錄將於該物業售出後失效。
explanation_en: A Memorandum registered by a property management company typically relates to unpaid management fees. Statement (i) is correct (outstanding fees). Statement (ii) is correct (management company is the registering party). Statement (iii) is incorrect (property can still be assigned without consent). Statement (iv) is incorrect (debt does not automatically cease upon sale).
explanation_cn: 由物業管理公司登記的備忘錄通常涉及未繳管理費。陳述 (i) 正確（費用尚未繳付）。陳述 (ii) 正確（管理公司是登記方）。陳述 (iii) 不正確（物業可在未取得同意下轉讓）。陳述 (iv) 不正確（債務不會在售出後自動失效）。

question_en: According to the land search in the Annex , what is the unexpired term of the Government Lease of Section C of Inland Lot No. 282 8 as at the date of the search?
question_cn: 根據附件中的查冊，截至查冊日期，內地段第2828號C分段的政府租契尚餘多少年期？
explanation_en: The Government Lease for Section C of Inland Lot No. 2828 was a 999-year lease. As at the search date (around 2013), approximately 848 years remain unexpired. Many old Hong Kong Island lots were granted 999-year leases.
explanation_cn: 內地段第2828號C分段的政府租契為999年期。截至查冊日期（約2013年），尚餘約848年。許多香港島舊地段獲批999年期租契。

question_en: To comply with the Practice Regulation, what is the latest time for Sunlight to enter into an Estate Agency Agreement (Form 3) with Amy?
question_cn: 為遵守《常規規例》，Sunlight最遲須於何時與Amy簽訂地產代理協議（表格3）？
explanation_en: Under the Practice Regulation, a licensed estate agent must enter into an estate agency agreement with the client before commencing any estate agency work. Since Amy called on 5 January 2013, Sunlight must enter into Form 3 on that date before starting any work.
explanation_cn: 根據《常規規例》，持牌地產代理必須在開始任何地產代理工作之前與客戶簽訂地產代理協議。由於Amy於2013年1月5日致電，Sunlight必須在該日期簽訂表格3，然後才可開始工作。

question_en: With regard to the shop window poster and the la mppost bills to advertise the Property, which of the following provisions in the Practice Regulation has Sunlight contravened? (i) A licensed estate agent shall obtain the vendor ’s written consent prior to the issue of an advertisement in respect o f the vendor’s residential property. (ii) A licensed estate agent shall not cause or per mit to be advertised a residential property in respect of which he is acti ng as the agent at a price or on terms different from those instructed b y the client concerned. (iii) A licensed estate agent shall not cause or pe rmit to be issued an advertisement wholly or partly relating to his esta te agency business which includes any statement or particular that is false or misleading in a material particular.
question_cn:
就用於宣傳該物業的店舖櫥窗海報及燈柱廣告而言，Sunlight違反了《常規規例》中以下哪些規定？
(i) 持牌地產代理須在就賣方的住宅物業發出廣告之前，取得賣方的書面同意。
(ii) 持牌地產代理不得導致或容許以有別於有關客戶所指示的價格或條款宣傳其作為代理的住宅物業。
(iii) 持牌地產代理不得導致或容許發出任何全部或部分涉及其地產代理業務的廣告，而該廣告載有任何在要項上虛假或具誤導性的陳述或詳情。
explanation_en: Sunlight contravened all three provisions: (i) advertising without the vendor's prior written consent, (ii) advertising at a different price from what Amy instructed ($3.5M instead of $3.2M), and (iii) issuing advertisements containing materially false or misleading information.
explanation_cn: Sunlight違反了全部三項規定：(i) 未事先取得賣方書面同意即刊登廣告；(ii) 以有別於Amy指示的價格宣傳物業（$350萬而非$320萬）；及 (iii) 發出載有在要項上虛假或具誤導性資料的廣告。

question_en: To comply with the Estate Agents Ordinance, Prac tice Regulation and Code of Ethics, which of the following matters should John disclose to Mrs. Poon? (i) his salesperson’s licence number (ii) Amy’s offer to give him personally an extra ca sh incentive of $5,000 if he successfully sold the Property (iii) the subsisting encumbrances on the Property (iv) the reason why Amy wanted to sell the Property
question_cn:
為遵守《地產代理條例》、《常規規例》及《操守守則》，John應向潘太太披露以下哪些事項？
(i) 其營業員牌照號碼
(ii) Amy向他個人提出的額外$5,000現金獎勵，條件是他成功售出該物業
(iii) 該物業的現存產權負擔
(iv) Amy出售該物業的原因
explanation_en: John must disclose: (i) his licence number (required by law), (ii) the personal cash incentive from Amy (conflict of interest), and (iii) subsisting encumbrances (material information for buyer). The vendor's reason for selling (iv) is confidential and should not be disclosed without consent.
explanation_cn: John必須披露：(i) 牌照號碼（法律要求）；(ii) Amy的個人現金獎勵（利益衝突）；及 (iii) 現存產權負擔（買方重要資料）。賣方出售原因 (iv) 屬機密資料，未經同意不應披露。

question_en: Which of the following acts/omissions on the par t of John may subject him to disciplinary sanctions by the Estate Agents Authori ty? (i) John did not supply a copy of the land search t o Mrs. Poon before the provisional agreement for sale and purchase of the Property was entered into. (ii) John issued an advertisement for the sale of t he Property at $3.5 million instead of $3.2 million as instructed by Am y. (iii) John posted advertising bills on lampposts in the streets. (iv) John entered into an Estate Agency Agreement ( Form 4) on behalf of Sunlight with Mrs. Poon on 25 January 2013. (v) In reply to Mrs. Poon’s question as to whether the open kitchen was an unauthorised alteration, John advised that there should not be any problem.
question_cn:
以下John的哪些作為／不作為可能使他受到地產代理監管局的紀律處分？
(i) John在該物業的臨時買賣合約簽訂前，沒有向潘太太提供查冊副本。
(ii) John刊登廣告以$350萬出售該物業，而非Amy指示的$320萬。
(iii) John在街道燈柱上張貼廣告單張。
(iv) John於2013年1月25日代表Sunlight與潘太太簽訂地產代理協議（表格4）。
(v) 就潘太太詢問開放式廚房是否屬於僭建改動一事，John回覆說應該沒有問題。
explanation_en: John may face disciplinary sanctions for: (i) failing to supply a land search copy before the PASP, (ii) advertising at a wrong price, (iii) illegal fly-posting on lampposts, and (v) giving misleading advice about the open kitchen. Entering into Form 4 with Mrs. Poon (iv) is a proper required step.
explanation_cn: John可能因以下行為受紀律處分：(i) 未在簽署臨時合約前提供查冊副本；(ii) 以錯誤價格刊登廣告；(iii) 在燈柱上非法張貼廣告；及 (v) 就開放式廚房提供誤導性建議。與潘太太簽訂表格4 (iv) 是正確的必要步驟。

question_en: Which of the following acts/omissions may be in contravention of the Practice Regulation and/or are improper practices? (i) John accepted Amy’s offer to give him personall y an extra cash incentive of $5,000 and did not reveal this to his supervisor. (ii) John did not disclose to Mrs. Poon that he wou ld receive an extra cash incentive of $5,000 from Amy. (iii) Sunlight did not enter into an estate agency agreement (Form 3) with Amy. (iv) John did not make any enquiries before replyin g to Mrs. Poon’s question about the open kitchen.
question_cn:
以下哪些作為／不作為可能違反《常規規例》及／或屬不當執業行為？
(i) John接受Amy向其個人提出的額外$5,000現金獎勵，且沒有向其上司透露此事。
(ii) John沒有向潘太太披露他將會收取Amy的$5,000額外現金獎勵。
(iii) Sunlight沒有與Amy簽訂地產代理協議（表格3）。
(iv) John在回答潘太太有關開放式廚房的問題前，沒有作出任何查詢。

options_en.E: (i), (ii), (iii) and (iv) Case Study Mr. Wan Kwok Wah (“Mr. Wan”) was a co-owner of a re sidential flat at Flat G, 6 th Floor, Elite Mansion, No. 2 Elite Avenue, Hong Kong (“the Property”). In November 2012, as Mr. Wan wished to move out from the Proper ty, he listed the Property for sale w

explanation_en: All four acts/omissions contravene the Practice Regulation: (i) accepting a personal incentive without disclosing to supervisor, (ii) failing to disclose the incentive to Mrs. Poon (conflict of interest), (iii) failing to enter into Form 3 with Amy, and (iv) giving advice without making proper enquiries (improper practice under the Code of Ethics).
explanation_cn: 四項均違反《常規規例》：(i) 接受個人獎勵而未向上司披露；(ii) 未向潘太太披露獎勵（利益衝突）；(iii) 未與Amy簽訂表格3；及 (iv) 未作適當查詢即提供建議（《操守守則》下的不當執業行為）。

question_en: For the purpose of completing the Property Infor mation Form (Form 1), which of the following are the current and subsisting encumb rances on the Property, according to the land search in the Annex ? (i) Undertaking Memorial No. UB6377410 (ii) Mortgage Memorial No. 05042702460799 (iii) Order Memorial No. 10122800250061 (iv) Memorandum of Charge Memorial No. 121218000900 09
question_cn:
為填寫物業資料表格（表格1），根據附件中的查冊，以下哪些是該物業現存的產權負擔？
(i) 承諾書備忘錄編號 UB6377410
(ii) 按揭備忘錄編號 05042702460799
(iii) 命令備忘錄編號 10122800250061
(iv) 押記備忘錄編號 121218000900009
explanation_en: The current subsisting encumbrances are: the Mortgage (ii), the Order/building order (iii), and the Memorandum of Charge (iv). The Undertaking (i) would have been fulfilled or discharged. Only instruments currently in force should be disclosed on Form 1.
explanation_cn: 現存的產權負擔為：按揭 (ii)、命令/建築命令 (iii) 及押記備忘錄 (iv)。承諾書 (i) 已履行或解除。只有仍然有效的文書才應在表格1中披露。

question_en: Which of the following documents would likely se t out the rights and obligations of the owners of Inland Lot No. 8780 and/or Elite M ansion? (i) Deed of Mutual Covenant and Management Agreemen t with Plans Memorial No. UB6643382 (ii) Assignment Memorial No. 05042702460788 (iii) Conditions of Exchange No. 12213 (iv) Agreement for Sale and Purchase with Plan Memo rial No. UB6405718
question_cn:
以下哪些文件可能列出內地段第8780號及／或雅閣大廈業主的權利及義務？
(i) 公契及管理協議連圖則備忘錄編號 UB6643382
(ii) 轉讓契備忘錄編號 05042702460788
(iii) 交換條件第12213號
(iv) 買賣合約連圖則備忘錄編號 UB6405718
explanation_en: The Deed of Mutual Covenant (DMC) (i) sets out owners' rights and obligations including management and common areas. The Conditions of Exchange (iii) set out government lease conditions for the lot. Assignment deeds (ii) only transfer ownership; the ASP (iv) is a transaction document. Neither sets out ongoing rights and obligations of owners.
explanation_cn: 公契 (i) 列出業主的權利及義務，包括管理及公用地方。交換條件 (iii) 列出地段的政府租契條件。轉讓契 (ii) 僅轉移業權，買賣合約 (iv) 屬交易文件，兩者均不列出業主的持續性權利及義務。

question_en: When completing the Property Information Form (F orm 1) for the Property, Edith may check: (i) Conditions of Exchange No. 12213 of Inland Lot No. 8780 to find out the saleable area of the Property (ii) Occupation Permit Memorial No. UB6554556 to fi nd out the year of completion of the Property (iii) Occupation Permit Memorial No. UB6554556 to f ind out the permitted user of the Property (iv) Agreement for Sale and Purchase with Plan Memo rial No. UB6405718 to find out the saleable area of the Prop erty
question_cn:
在填寫該物業的物業資料表格（表格1）時，Edith可查閱：
(i) 內地段第8780號的交換條件第12213號，以查明該物業的實用面積
(ii) 入伙紙備忘錄編號 UB6554556，以查明該物業的落成年份
(iii) 入伙紙備忘錄編號 UB6554556，以查明該物業的許可用途
(iv) 買賣合約連圖則備忘錄編號 UB6405718，以查明該物業的實用面積
explanation_en: Edith may check: (i) Conditions of Exchange for area information, (ii) Occupation Permit for year of completion, and (iii) Occupation Permit for permitted use. The ASP (iv) is not the prescribed source for saleable area; the prescribed source is the RVD's Property Information Online service.
explanation_cn: Edith可查閱：(i) 交換條件了解面積資料；(ii) 入伙紙查明落成年份；及 (iii) 入伙紙查明許可用途。買賣合約 (iv) 並非實用面積的訂明來源；訂明來源為差餉物業估價署的「物業資訊網」。

question_en: For which of the following documents registered in the land register of the Property should Sunny advise Polly to obtain legal advice? (i) Assignment Memorial No. 05042702460788 (ii) Order Memorial No. 10122800250061 (iii) Memorandum of Charge Memorial No. 12121800090 009
question_cn:
就該物業的土地登記冊中登記的以下哪些文件，Sunny應建議Polly尋求法律意見？
(i) 轉讓契備忘錄編號 05042702460788
(ii) 命令備忘錄編號 10122800250061
(iii) 押記備忘錄編號 121218000900009
explanation_en: Sunny should advise Polly to obtain legal advice regarding the Order Memorial (ii) (building order) and the Memorandum of Charge (iii) (financial encumbrance), as these materially affect the buyer's interests. The Assignment (i) is a standard transfer document not requiring special legal advice.
explanation_cn: Sunny應建議Polly就命令備忘錄 (ii)（建築命令）及押記備忘錄 (iii)（財務產權負擔）尋求法律意見，因為這些重大影響買方利益。轉讓契 (i) 是標準轉讓文件，不需要特別法律意見。

question_en: Based on the information available from the land search in the Annex , which of the following statements regarding the instrument r egistered with Memorial No. 12121800090009 is/are correct? (i) It is a record of the monthly management fees p ayable by each owner of Elite Mansion. (ii) It is an encumbrance affecting the Property. (iii) It should be stated in the provisional agreem ent for sale and purchase that this instrument must be discharged on or before completion.
question_cn:
根據附件中查冊的可用資料，以下哪些有關備忘錄編號 12121800090009 所登記的文書的陳述是正確的？
(i) 它記錄了雅閣大廈每位業主每月應繳的管理費。
(ii) 它是影響該物業的產權負擔。
(iii) 臨時買賣合約中應列明此文書必須在成交當日或之前予以解除。
explanation_en: The Memorandum of Charge is an encumbrance affecting the property (ii) and should be stated in the PASP as requiring discharge on or before completion (iii). It is not a record of monthly management fees (i); it is a charge securing a debt.
explanation_cn: 押記備忘錄是影響該物業的產權負擔 (ii)，且應在臨時合約中列明須在成交前解除 (iii)。它並非每月管理費的記錄 (i)，而是為保障債務而登記的押記。

question_en: On the basis of the facts in the Case Study, whi ch of the following complaints against Sunny that Polly made to the Estate Agents Authority have reasonable grounds? (i) Sunny failed to provide her with a copy of the land search of the Property. (ii) Sunny misstated to her that the Property was n ot subject to any subsisting encumbrances. (iii) Sunny should not have arranged for her to sig n a provisional agreement for sale and purchase with the terms not filled in.
question_cn:
根據個案研究中的事實，Polly向地產代理監管局就Sunny提出的以下哪些投訴具有合理依據？
(i) Sunny未能向她提供該物業的查冊副本。
(ii) Sunny向她錯誤陳述該物業不受任何現存產權負擔所影響。
(iii) Sunny不應安排她簽署一份條款未填妥的臨時買賣合約。
explanation_en: All three complaints have reasonable grounds: (i) the Practice Regulation requires supplying a land search copy before the PASP; (ii) misstating no encumbrances is material misrepresentation; (iii) arranging to sign a PASP with unfilled terms is improper practice prejudicing client interests.
explanation_cn: 三項投訴均有合理依據：(i) 《常規規例》要求在簽署臨時合約前提供查冊副本；(ii) 錯誤陳述無產權負擔屬重大失實陳述；(iii) 安排簽署條款未填妥的臨時合約屬損害客戶利益的不當行為。

question_en: Under the Practice Regulation, when must Edith p rovide a completed Property Information Form (Form 1) to Mr. Wan?
question_cn: 根據《常規規例》，Edith必須於何時向溫先生提供已填妥的物業資料表格（表格1）？

options_en.A: Before she enters into an Estate Agency Agreemen t (Form 3) with Mr. Wan or before Mr. Wan enters into an agreement for sale and purchase with a purchaser, at the option of Edith.
options_en.B: Before she begins marketing the Property for Mr. Wan.
options_en.C: Before she enters into an Estate Agency Agreemen t (Form 3) with Mr. Wan or before Mr. Wan enters into an agreement for sale and purchase with a purchaser, at the option of Mr. Wan.
options_en.D: After she enters into an Estate Agency Agreement (Form 3) with Mr. Wan but before completion of the sale and purchase of t he Property.
options_en.E: After Mr. Wan enters into an agreement for sale and purchase with a purchaser.

options_cn.A: 在她與溫先生簽訂地產代理協議（表格3）之前，或在溫先生與買方簽訂買賣合約之前，由Edith選擇。
options_cn.B: 在她開始為溫先生推銷該物業之前。
options_cn.C: 在她與溫先生簽訂地產代理協議（表格3）之前，或在溫先生與買方簽訂買賣合約之前，由溫先生選擇。
options_cn.D: 在她與溫先生簽訂地產代理協議（表格3）之後，但在該物業的買賣完成之前。
options_cn.E: 在溫先生與買方簽訂買賣合約之後。

explanation_en: Under the Practice Regulation, the agent must provide Form 1 to the vendor either before entering into Form 3 or before the vendor enters into an agreement for sale and purchase, at the option of the vendor (not the agent).
explanation_cn: 根據《常規規例》，代理必須在簽訂表格3之前或賣方簽訂買賣合約之前向賣方提供表格1，由賣方（而非代理）選擇。

question_en: Since the land search of the Property revealed that the Property was subject to Building Order Memorial No. 10122800250061 (“Buildi ng Order”), Edith might have breached the Practice Regulation if she did not: (i) disclose the Building Order in the Property Inf ormation Form (Form 1). (ii) attach a copy of the Building Order to the Pro perty Information Form (Form 1) and supply them to Mr. Wan. (iii) advise Mr. Wan to produce a receipt of the pa yment of his contribution to the costs of the maintenance work.
question_cn:
由於該物業的查冊顯示該物業受建築命令備忘錄編號 10122800250061（「建築命令」）所影響，如Edith沒有做到以下事項，她可能已違反《常規規例》：
(i) 在物業資料表格（表格1）中披露該建築命令。
(ii) 將該建築命令的副本附於物業資料表格（表格1），並提供予溫先生。
(iii) 建議溫先生出示其繳付維修工程費用分擔額的收據。
explanation_en: Edith is required to disclose the Building Order in Form 1 (i). However, there is no specific requirement to attach a copy of the building order to Form 1 (ii), nor to advise the vendor to produce maintenance cost payment receipts (iii). These exceed the Practice Regulation's specific requirements.
explanation_cn: Edith須在表格1中披露建築命令 (i)。然而，並無特定要求將建築命令副本附於表格1 (ii)，亦無要求建議賣方出示維修費用收據 (iii)。這些超出了《常規規例》的具體要求。

question_en: When Smart Agency and Mr. Wan entered into an E state Agency Agreement (Form 3), which of the following information should Smart Agency have obtained in order to comply with the requirements o f the Estate Agents Ordinance and Practice Regulation? (i) the particulars of the current ownership of the Property (ii) the saleable area of the Property (iii) the year of completion of the Property (iv) the market value of the Property
question_cn:
當Smart Agency與溫先生簽訂地產代理協議（表格3）時，為遵守《地產代理條例》及《常規規例》的要求，Smart Agency應已取得以下哪些資料？
(i) 該物業現時業權的詳情
(ii) 該物業的實用面積
(iii) 該物業的落成年份
(iv) 該物業的市場價值
explanation_en: The agent should have obtained: (i) current ownership particulars, (ii) saleable area, and (iii) year of completion, all required for Form 1. Market value (iv) is not prescribed information; the listing price is set by the vendor's instructions.
explanation_cn: 代理應已取得：(i) 現時業權詳情；(ii) 實用面積；及 (iii) 落成年份，均為表格1所需。市場價值 (iv) 並非訂明資料；放盤價由賣方指示決定。

question_en: Regarding the fact that the Property had been h eld by Mr. Wan and his brother as tenants in common and that his brother had passed a way the previous year, leaving a will appointing Mr. Wan as his sole execu tor, which of the following statements is correct?
question_cn: 鑑於該物業由溫先生與其兄弟以分權共有人身份持有，而其兄弟已於前一年去世，並留下遺囑委任溫先生為唯一遺囑執行人，以下哪項陳述是正確的？

options_en.A: Mr. Wan should produce a letter from the Inland Revenue Department to show that the estate duty of his brother was fully settled.
options_en.B: Mr. Wan should produce the grant of probate in r espect of his brother’s estate showing Mr. Wan as the sole executor of his brother’s estate.
options_en.C: Mr. Wan has become the sole owner of the Propert y under the doctrine of survivorship.
options_en.D: Mr. Wan should produce the death certificate and the will of his brother in order to show that Mr. Wan is the sole owner of the Property.
options_en.E: The assignment of the Property must be jointly e xecuted by Mr. Wan and the beneficiary(ies) of his brother’s estate. 93

options_cn.A: 溫先生應出示稅務局的信函，以證明其兄弟的遺產稅已全數繳清。
options_cn.B: 溫先生應出示關於其兄弟遺產的遺囑認證書，顯示溫先生為其兄弟遺產的唯一遺囑執行人。
options_cn.C: 根據生存者取得權原則，溫先生已成為該物業的唯一業主。
options_cn.D: 溫先生應出示其兄弟的死亡證明書及遺囑，以證明溫先生是該物業的唯一業主。
options_cn.E: 該物業的轉讓契必須由溫先生與其兄弟遺產的受益人共同簽立。

explanation_en: Since they held as tenants in common (not joint tenants), the doctrine of survivorship does not apply (C is wrong). Mr. Wan needs a grant of probate to deal with his brother's share. A death certificate and will alone (D) are insufficient. Estate duty was abolished in HK in 2006, making (A) irrelevant.
explanation_cn: 由於以分權共有人身份持有，生存者取得權不適用（C不正確）。溫先生需取得遺囑認證書處理兄弟份額。僅有死亡證明書及遺囑 (D) 不足夠。香港已於2006年廢除遺產稅，(A) 不適用。

question_en: Smart Agency might not be able to claim the unp aid commission from Polly. With regard to the Estate Agents Ordinance, which o f the following is/are probably the reason(s)? (i) Polly had lodged a complaint against Sunny with the Estate Agents Authority. (ii) The amount of the commission payable was more than 1% of the purchase price. (iii) Polly had not entered into an Estate Agency A greement (Form 4) with Smart Agency. (iv) Sunny had not supplied a copy of the land sear ch of the Property to Polly.
question_cn:
Smart Agency可能無法向Polly追討未付佣金。就《地產代理條例》而言，以下哪些可能是原因？
(i) Polly已向地產代理監管局投訴Sunny。
(ii) 應付佣金金額超過樓價的1%。
(iii) Polly並未與Smart Agency簽訂地產代理協議（表格4）。
(iv) Sunny並未向Polly提供該物業的查冊副本。
explanation_en: Under section 46 of the EAO, an estate agent cannot recover commission unless a prescribed estate agency agreement was entered into. Since Polly did not enter into Form 4 with Smart Agency (iii), this is the key reason. Filing a complaint (i) does not affect claims; commission is not capped at 1% (ii); land search (iv) is a separate matter.
explanation_cn: 根據《地產代理條例》第46條，除非已簽訂訂明的地產代理協議，否則不得追討佣金。Polly未簽訂表格4 (iii) 是關鍵原因。投訴 (i) 不影響申索；佣金無1%上限 (ii)；查冊 (iv) 屬另外事宜。
